title: Bread's Biomes Mod
description: Mod that adds new biomes for minecraft Better Than Adventure!
body:
This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page.

This mod adds new biomes to your world.
Current list of biomes:
1. Indev Plains
  Generates in areas with high temperature. Has retro grass, retro oak and two new structures with new blocks: Brick pyramid with retro bricks; Starting house with retro cobblestone and retro mossy cobblestone.
